calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2020 Off Calendar

Motion For Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-12-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant SHR Group LLC, a Delaware limited liability company.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Patricia Dowling, CSR #5388. Email: pdowling@sftc.org.

Order To Show Cause For Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Oct-11-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Ethan Dettmer, 415.393.8292 for Plaintiff Shr. St. Francis, LLC.
Andrew Paulson, 650.849.5214 for Plaintiff Shr. St. Francis, LLC.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Order To Show Cause For Preliminary Injunction is GRANTED as requested. Moving party met its burden. No opposition filed. Moving party to prepare order. Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
